title: Keurig Dr Pepper to Report Fourth Quarter 2022 Results and Host Conference Call
text: BURLINGTON, Mass. and FRISCO, Texas , Jan. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) will release its financial results for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2022 before the market opens on Thursday, February 23, 2023.

title: How About Another Dr Pepper? It's Still A 'Buy'
text: I wrote about KDP, or Keurig Dr Pepper back in June of last year, establishing my foundational thesis and PT. I bought some shares as well. The company has performed quite decently, being up above market for most of the time, and ending at a close to 3% outperformance for the year.
